section_text_parts: In the section about deployment you will see how to set up HTTPS for free, using Traefik and Let's Encrypt.
tutorial/security/index::section-0004::a.section_text: In the section about deployment you will see how to set up HTTPS for free, using Traefik and Let's Encrypt.

section_text_parts: Integrating other authentication/authorization providers like Google, Facebook, X (Twitter), GitHub, etc. is also possible and relatively easy.
The most complex problem is building an authentication/authorization provider like those, but FastAPI gives you the tools to do it easily, while doing the heavy lifting for you.
tutorial/security/index::section-0007::a.section_text:
Integrating other authentication/authorization providers like Google, Facebook, X (Twitter), GitHub, etc. is also possible and relatively easy.

The most complex problem is building an authentication/authorization provider like those, but FastAPI gives you the tools to do it easily, while doing the heavy lifting for you.
